# OffshoreProz — Agent Company MCP

> A hosted Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that lets an autonomous AI agent form
> a real legal entity: a Nevis LLC ("Agent Company") that owns the agent, contains its
> liability, and proves its authority via a bespoke Agent Charter. Optional Wyoming LLC
> subsidiary for USD/fiat rails. Paid in USDC. Built for agents, not DAOs.

## What it is
- Remote MCP server (Streamable HTTP). Connect via Smithery or directly by URL.
- Free tool: `agent_company_diagnostic` — scores an agent's liability/authority exposure
  and recommends a structure (monitor / Nevis / Nevis + Wyoming). No API key required.
- Formation tools (API key): create_formation_request, get_formation_status,
  get_documents, get_compliance_calendar, request_amendment.

## How it fits the agent stack
- OffshoreProz = the legal-entity & authority layer.
- Pairs with Mercury MCP (banking), Stripe MCP (payments), Pipedream/Composio (apps),
  Arcade (authorization/audit).

## Docs
- Product: https://offshoreproz.com/agent_company
- Free diagnostic: https://offshoreproz.com/diagnostic
- Guides: https://offshoreproz.com/learn
- Smithery listing: https://smithery.ai/server/offshoreproz/agent-company

## Notes
- The AI agent is an authorized delegate, never a member or legal person; there is always
  at least one human principal who completes KYC out-of-band.
- OffshoreProz is not a law firm; documents are drafts finalized with licensed counsel.
